articles.title: HEAT INDEX WATCH: Six Calabarzon areas face dangerous levels
articles.description: LUCENA CITY, Quezon – At least six areas in the Calabarzon (Cavite, Laguna, Batangas, Rizal, Quezon) region are expected to experience dangerous heat index levels on Thursday and Friday, May 14 and 15, amid the continuing extreme heat. In its 5 p.m. forecast issued Wednesday, the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) said Sangley Point in Cavite City, Cavite is forecast to register a heat index of 44 degrees Celsius on Thursday and 45°C on Friday. Cavite City has been experiencing dangerous heat conditions in recent days, with the heat index reaching as high as 45°C on April [...]... Keep on reading: HEAT INDEX WATCH: Six Calabarzon areas face dangerous levels

articles.title: WATCH: This Deer Got So Drunk on Fermented Plants That Police Had to Warn Drivers to Be Careful Nearby
articles.description: Somewhere in rural eastern France, a deer recently discovered the joys of fermentation. It’s good for your gut. It provides a wide range of beneficial probiotics that improve digestion. It can also get you f—ked up. Police in the Saône-et-Loire region posted video footage of the deer sprinting through a field, leaping about—frolicking, really—after having [...] The post WATCH: This Deer Got So Drunk on Fermented Plants That Police Had to Warn Drivers to Be Careful Nearby appeared first on VICE .
